clusters.name: Maintenance Inspection Report
clusters.description: Periodic A/B/C/D-check inspection findings with ATA-chapter references, corrective actions, and DGCA-licensed sign-off.

clusters.name: Flight Test Report
clusters.description: Certification and acceptance flight test runs per CAR-23 / CS-25, with test conditions, parameters measured, and crew sign-off.

clusters.name: Service Bulletin
clusters.description: Manufacturer-issued modification advisories with ATA chapter, effectivity range, compliance window, and approved engineering authority.

fields.name: inspection_date
fields.description: Calendar date the inspection was performed

fields.name: total_flight_hours
fields.description: Total airframe flight hours at inspection

fields.name: total_flight_cycles
fields.description: Total airframe flight cycles at inspection

fields.name: findings
fields.description: List of findings with corrective actions

fields.name: next_inspection_due
fields.description: Date the next inspection is due

fields.name: narrative_summary
fields.description: One-line summary of the inspector's narrative paragraph (derived from prose)
fields.example: Pressurization controller anomaly logged for trend monitoring

fields.name: investigation_reference
fields.description: Investigation / surveillance reference cited in narrative

fields.name: defect_severity
fields.description: Qualitative severity inferred from prose (minor / moderate / significant)

fields.name: recommendation_text
fields.description: Inspector's free-form recommendation extracted from narrative
fields.example: Recommend component replacement at the next available C-check, not to exceed 1,500 FH.

groups.name: Inspection Scope
groups.description: Check level, ATA chapter, AMM reference

groups.name: Certification
groups.description: Inspector sign-off and next due date

groups.name: Narrative Findings
groups.description: Fields derived from the prose narrative section

fields.name: test_objective
fields.description: Stated objective per the test plan

fields.name: observations
fields.description: Test observations bulleted by the FTE

fields.name: conclusion
fields.description: Pass / pass with observations / partial pass

fields.name: discussion_summary
fields.description: Concise summary of the prose discussion paragraph
fields.example: Handling satisfactory; minor lateral PIO suppressed by reduced stick input

fields.name: handling_qualities_rating
fields.description: Qualitative HQR derived from discussion prose

fields.name: anomaly_described
fields.description: Anomaly or surprise mentioned in pilot prose (free-form)
fields.example: Brief 0.3 g vertical disturbance at flaps transition

fields.name: certification_recommendation
fields.description: Recommendation extracted from the discussion section
fields.example: Recommend approval of the test point for certification basis.

groups.name: Pilot Discussion
groups.description: Fields derived from the prose discussion section

fields.name: reason
fields.description: Why the SB is being issued

fields.name: background_summary
fields.description: Summary of the background/rationale narrative paragraph
fields.example: Field experience identified accelerated bearing wear under cold-soak conditions

fields.name: in_service_incident_count
fields.description: Number of in-service occurrences cited in prose (extracted as integer)

fields.name: risk_classification
fields.description: Risk category inferred from narrative (LOW / MINOR / MAJOR / HAZARDOUS)

fields.name: residual_risk_text
fields.description: Residual risk statement extracted from narrative

groups.name: Risk Narrative
groups.description: Fields derived from the prose background section
